arts.sum: Germany's preeminent footballing publication reports that VfL Wolfsburg managing director Peter Christiansen has eyes for another Danish international.

arts.ttl: Liverpool backed for Premier League, Champions League double as Nottingham Forest title verdict delivered
arts.sum: The Premier League title is still Liverpool's to throw away despite their recent setback at fellow chasers Nottingham Forest, Jermaine Pennant tells Sports Mole.

arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly preparing to face competition from Nottingham Forest for the services of Brentford attacker Yoane Wissa this month.

arts.ttl: 'You have to' - Ryan Gravenberch addresses Liverpool fitness fears
arts.sum: Ryan Gravenberch has been a virtual ever-present for Liverpool in midfield this season
